content:
I'm trying to wrap libbcachefs for bcachefs-tools, are there any recomendations for generating bindings for variable length structs? the code I have currently builds, but the bindgen layout tests fail for one of the structs that's a parent of this variable length one.

I also found some 5 year old advice on reddit for defining the struct manually and it just triggers another error about needing ?Size instead of 0 on the generated code.
